114975.description_en_long: Rising 258 meters at the center of Uku Island in Nagasaki Prefecture, Shirogadake is regarded as the island's premier viewpoint, offering a sweeping panorama of the Goto Islands. Within Saikai National Park, its summit also preserves a former Imperial Japanese Navy radar station, recognized as a Japan Heritage site tied to the Sasebo Naval District.
